title: eschenbachia muliensis
intro: Eschenbachia muliensis, also known as Yunnan prairie cotton or Yunnan cotton thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Eschenbachia muliensis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Eschenbachia muliensis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers of the plant in hot water.
